hero.title: SCATTOLINI GROUP
hero.subtitle: Luxury Real Estate
hero.tagline: Your gateway to exclusive living in South Florida

about.title: Scattolini Group
about.paragraph: Scattolini Group is a team of experts with decades of experience in the South Florida real estate market. We have had the privilege of assisting numerous clients from diverse parts of the world, providing them with our wide range of services in the real estate field in this vibrant region.
about.consultationText: Any of our experts would be delighted to schedule a consultation to explore the options available according to your needs

liderazgo.title: Expert team, personalized service
liderazgo.paragraph1: Scattolini Group is led by Elda Scattolini, a real estate agent with 20 years of experience in the South Florida market. Elda has helped hundreds of clients from around the world reach their real estate goals with professionalism, integrity, and dedication.
liderazgo.paragraph2: Elda and her team are experts in South Florida, with deep knowledge of neighborhoods, schools, amenities, and market trends. They will guide you through every step of the process, from finding the right property to negotiating the best price and closing efficiently.

manzione.title: Manzione Properties
manzione.descripcion: Specialists in architecture, design, and high-end residential development.

vista-harbor.slogan: Luxury living along the Miami River

introduccion.0: Continuing Henry Pino's vision of transformation along the Miami River, ALTA Development introduces Vista Harbor Residences & Yacht Club — a 12-story condominium community featuring 242 residences and 37,000 SF of exclusive amenities, fronting 650 feet along the picturesque Miami River.
introduccion.1: Spread across two separate towers with independent lobbies, the collection includes studios and one- to four-bedroom residences. This bold modern design offers unrivaled riverfront access, providing residents with stunning views and seamless connectivity to Biscayne Bay and the best of Miami.

edificio.ubicacionValor: Along the Miami River, Miami, FL
edificio.alquiler: West Tower: minimum 30-day short-term rental permitted, turnkey investment opportunity
edificio.hospital: Minutes from University of Miami Health campus and Jackson Memorial Hospital

residencias.vistas: Stunning Miami River and Biscayne Bay views
residencias.paquetes: Furniture package options available (Adriana Hoyos design) — turnkey rental-ready

amenidades.muelle: Private docks — cruise the city directly from your home (Yacht Club)
amenidades.piscina: Rooftop pool with stunning river and city views
amenidades.acceso: Quick access to Downtown Miami, Midtown, Edgewater, Miami Beach, Design District, Miami International Airport, Port of Miami, and Brightline Train Station
amenidades.riverLanding: 5-minute drive to River Landing mall — Publix, 9 restaurants, 21 retailers

tula-residences.direccion: 7918 West Drive, North Bay Village, FL 33141
tula-residences.constructora: Bayshore Grove Capital; Pacific & Orient Properties, LLC
tula-residences.slogan: One foot in the city. One foot in the sand.

introduccion.0: Serenity with a Miami address: 21 waterfront stories on Biscayne Bay with only 54 residences and six exclusive penthouses.
introduccion.1: Corner-only layout with four residences per floor (levels 7 to 19), wraparound glass terraces, and pre-wired high-speed connectivity.

items.0: Corner-only residences with four units per floor (levels 7 to 19)
items.1: Six exclusive penthouses across floors 20 to 22
items.2: Wraparound glass terraces for every residence
items.3: Kinetic modern architecture balancing uniformity and singularity
items.4: Refined, organic interiors with contemporary finishes
items.6: Biscayne Bay views with direct access to the promenade

items.0: Two-, two-plus-den, and three-bedroom residences from 1,590 to 2,440 square feet
items.3: Italian-designed kitchens with integrated Miele appliances
items.6: Penthouses: 3,700 to 4,140 square feet, five bedrooms plus den, and five-and-a-half bathrooms
items.7: Panoramic Biscayne Bay and Miami skyline views

items.0: Resort-style pool with deck and private cabanas
items.1: Wellness center with state-of-the-art fitness facility
items.4: Private dining room with catering kitchen
items.5: Residents' lounge with bay views and promenade access

introduccion.0: Kempinski Residences Miami Design District introduces a landmark of European luxury to one of Miami's most prestigious addresses. Located at 3801 & 3883 Biscayne Blvd — at the gateway to the Miami Design District™ — this dual-tower development brings the legendary Kempinski hospitality brand to life through two 23-story residential towers, united by an exclusive amenity bridge on the fourth floor.
introduccion.1: With 64 residences per tower, 22 private guest suites, 6 townhomes, and approximately 70,000 square feet of curated amenities, Kempinski Residences offers an unparalleled lifestyle surrounded by luxury retail, chef-driven dining, cultural institutions, and sweeping views of Biscayne Bay and the Miami skyline.

edificio.ubicacionDescValor: Gateway to the Miami Design District™
edificio.unidadesValor: 64 residences per tower + 22 private guest suites + 6 townhomes
edificio.amenidadesValor: Approx. 70,000 sq ft across both towers
edificio.parking: Onsite structured parking for residents and guests

residencias.tiposValor: 2 Bed / 2.5 Bath + Den and 4 Bed / 4.5 Bath + Den
residencias.techos: 11' high ceilings in Great Room, Bedrooms, Den and Balcony
residencias.balcon: 10' deep balconies with unobstructed Biscayne Bay views
residencias.piedra: Natural stone finishes throughout, curated by Rockwell Group
residencias.cocinaValor: Full Gaggenau appliance package, waterfall island, natural stone countertops, custom cabinetry by Rockwell Group
residencias.suiteValor: Kallista fixtures, oversized walk-in closet, freestanding tub, Kohler Leap Smart Toilet

amenidades.beach: Beach entry pool with sun shelf
amenidades.cabanas: Open-air cabanas, daybeds & poolside social cabanas
amenidades.outdoor: Outdoor theater, games deck & outdoor lounge
amenidades.padel: Ground level Padel court & dog park
amenidades.wellness: Wellness sanctuary: cold plunge, infrared sauna, dry sauna, steam rooms, meditation & yoga garden
amenidades.spa: Coed spa with private treatment rooms & relaxation lounge
amenidades.gym: State-of-the-art fitness center + yoga & pilates movement studio
amenidades.familia: Children's splash pad, playground, playroom, game room, F1 simulator, golf simulator & teen's room
amenidades.social: Owner's Lounge, wine & cigar lounge, private dining room, chef's kitchen, music room & podcast room
amenidades.cafe: Sunrise Café & Wellness Café offering daily breakfast
